title: Shaded Knowledge Curator boundary handoff
body: Team member closeout: Boundary owned: temporary Knowledge Curator / napkin-tail active-shard processing. Outcome: processed the current active napkin captures into dispositions and routed napkin-tail candidates, including the fresh goal-backed handoff capture, without archiving unprocessed content. Evidence: focused prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check passed; strict-hard fitness passed SOFT (22 soft). Claims / queue / git state: Shaded claims closed; claims mine returns []; active commit queue returns []; working tree remains dirty with peer-owned source and shared-state work. Surprise or changed understanding: persistent goal-backed handoff state is now a pending candidate, not a blanket blocked-action rule. Blockers or risks: broader consolidate-docs/active-shard estate remains unfinished; active peer claims remain live. Handoff needed: next curator should continue per-entry active-shard processing after live claim check; do not archive shards wholesale.
